llm_context.content: Imagine you are helping software test engineers to create comprehensive test plans without delving i...

actionUnits.condition: MainCamera has MonoBehaviour GvrPointerPhysicsRaycaster (component fileID 1486385207, script guid eb5dd43baba2d4dc1bab789615567e3d) configured with raycasterEventMask.m_Bits=4294967295 and maxRaycastHits=64. This component matches the provided script source. No UnityEvent m_Calls are defined for this component in the scene. This trigger calls the inherited public method GetLastRay() to retrieve the last computed pointer ray prior to any EventSystem-driven raycasts.

To exercise GvrPointerPhysicsRaycaster.Raycast/PerformRaycast paths, an active EventSystem with GvrPointerInputModule and an active GvrBasePointer (PointerCamera set to MainCamera) must be present so eventCamera != null and Raycast is invoked automatically each frame. Ensure at least one physics Collider on a layer included by the raycasterEventMask is in front of the pointer; to cover both SphereCast and Raycast paths, run with pointer.CurrentPointerRadius > 0 (SphereCastNonAlloc) and = 0 (RaycastNonAlloc) in separate frames. Optionally place >= MaxRaycastHits colliders along the ray to trigger the max-hit warning and buffer resize. After the system updates, call GetLastRay() again to validate lastRay was updated.
